### Testing Checklist
<!-- Complete before requesting review -->

#### Visual Design
- [ ] Visual hierarchy is clear
- [ ] Colors meet WCAG contrast requirements (4.5:1 minimum)
- [ ] Typography is readable at intended sizes
- [ ] Layout is consistent and balanced
- [ ] Spacing follows grid system

#### User Experience
- [ ] User flow is intuitive
- [ ] Navigation is clear and functional
- [ ] Call-to-action is prominent and descriptive
- [ ] Interactive elements have clear feedback
- [ ] Touch targets meet minimum size (48x48px)

#### Accessibility
- [ ] All images have meaningful alt text
- [ ] Color contrast meets WCAG AA standards
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works properly
- [ ] Focus indicators are visible
- [ ] Design works with 200% text zoom

#### Responsive Design
- [ ] Mobile breakpoint tested (320px-768px)
- [ ] Tablet breakpoint tested (768px-1024px)
- [ ] Desktop breakpoint tested (1024px+)
- [ ] Touch interactions work on mobile
- [ ] Layout adapts appropriately

#### Cross-Browser
- [ ] Chrome/Edge tested
- [ ] Firefox tested
- [ ] Safari tested
- [ ] Mobile browsers tested

### Design Standards Reference
<!-- Reference design standards followed -->

- [ ] Material Design 3 guidelines
- [ ] Apple Human Interface Guidelines
- [ ] WCAG 2.1 Success Criteria
- [ ] Brand style guide
- [ ] Component library patterns

## Reviewer Checklist

### Design Review
- [ ] Visual design is consistent and professional
- [ ] User experience is improved
- [ ] Accessibility requirements are met
- [ ] Responsive design works properly
- [ ] Design aligns with brand guidelines

### Code Review (if applicable)
- [ ] Design is implemented correctly
- [ ] Code follows project conventions
- [ ] No performance regressions
- [ ] Cross-browser compatibility verified

### Approval Criteria
- [ ] All design standards met
- [ ] All accessibility requirements met
- [ ] All responsive breakpoints work
- [ ] Design review feedback addressed
- [ ] No regressions introduced
